problem: Add GOAL to the CLI create command's VALID_MODES array and --mode help text so users can create GOAL tickets from the command line.

files.why: VALID_MODES array (line 12): currently ['AUTO','BUILD','FIX','RESEARCH','EXECUTE']. Needs GOAL addition. Usage text (line 16) shows mode options. Validation (lines 78-87) normalizes to uppercase and checks against VALID_MODES. Mode sent in API body (line 91).
Ticket command router — dispatches to create.ts and other subcommands.

facts.claim: VALID_MODES has 5 values with no GOAL
facts.evidence: src/tickets/create.ts line 12: const VALID_MODES = ['AUTO','BUILD','FIX','RESEARCH','EXECUTE'] as const

facts.claim: Mode validation normalizes to uppercase and checks against array
facts.evidence: src/tickets/create.ts lines 78-87: modeRaw → toUpperCase() → includes check → exit with error if invalid

facts.claim: Mode sent conditionally in request body
Build: tsc; Typecheck: tsc --noEmit; Test: tsc && node --test dist/**/*.test.js
No existing goal-related code in CLI source
facts.evidence: Grep for 'goal' and 'Goal' found no matches in active TypeScript source files

unknowns.question: Should GOAL-specific CLI commands (e.g., hlx goals status, hlx goals proposals) be added in this ticket or deferred?
unknowns.context: Research report Section 8.3 marks src/goals/ commands as 'New (deferred)'. Only the create.ts VALID_MODES change is specified for this implementation.
